MINI MINUTES: 12:00pm
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, nothing on record, clerk-beth Wilber, Dept. 525: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, John G. Matthers, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, California Apostille Services, appears in Pro Per through Richard Greenberg. (Note: Richard Greenberg, ind., was dismissed by the Court at the Small Claims hearing on 12/30/09.) Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
